note: WeakSet used as a cycle-detection 'visited' guard during recursive AST traversal (findSemanticSchemaMetadata). Closest Effect form is MutableHashSet for local accumulation, but WeakSet relies on object-IDENTITY membership and weak-reference GC semantics that HashSet/MutableHashSet (value equality, strong refs) do not preserve. Local-only, never escapes the recursion. Human must decide whether identity-keyed membership matters before converting; may be left as WeakSet.
